session.user:
Run the following CI checks and report results. This is READ-ONLY - do not modify any files.
1. Run ruff check on the entire project: `ruff check` 2. Run ty check on the changed source files: - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py - src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py - src/erk/tui/commands/provider.py - src/erk/tui/commands/types.py - src/erk/tui/actions/palette.py - src/erk/tui/operations/workers.py 3. Run the existing run command tests to make sure we didn't break them: `pytest tests/commands/run/ -x` 4. Run the existing TUI command registry tests: `pytest tests/tui/commands/ -x`
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run these CI checks in parallel for efficiency. Let me execute all four commands.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on entire project

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py packages/erk-shar...[truncated 152 chars]...erk/tui/commands/types.py src/erk/tui/actions/palette.py src/erk/tui/operations/workers.py
Run ty check on changed source files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run existing TUI command registry tests

session.assistant:
Excellent! All CI checks have passed successfully.
## Summary
**All CI checks passed:**
1. **ruff check**: All checks passed! (entire project linted successfully) 2. **ty check**: All checks passed! (8 changed source files type-checked successfully) 3. **pytest tests/commands/run/**: 37 passed in 0.99s (no breakage in run command tests) 4. **pytest tests/tui/commands/**: 134 passed in 1.11s (no breakage in TUI command registry tests)
The implementation is clean and ready. No linting violations, type errors, or test failures detected.
